name: Green Peas with Celery and Ripe Olives
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Celery, sliced on an angle
8 ounces Can pitted ripe olives, drained and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place celery in melted butter in a deep 1-1/2 quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish. Cover and microwave for 3 minutes.
2. Add peas, cover, and microwave for an additional 4 minutes, stirring once.
3. Stir in olives and seasonings, cover, and microwave for 2 more minutes.
